title: subworkflow - aws ssm eks describe nodegroup
description:
Subworkflow to fetch EKS managed node group details using AWS Systems Manager automation

Parameters:

clusterName: (Required) EKS cluster name
nodegroupName: (Required) EKS managed node group name
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection
guide:
## Subworkflow to Describe EKS Nodegroup

This subworkflow runs the AWS-ExecuteAwsApi SSM runbook to call EKS DescribeNodegroup and return node group configuration and health details.

### Parameters

- clusterName (Required): EKS cluster name
- nodegroupName (Required): EKS managed node group name
- awsregion (Required): AWS region
- dynatraceawsconnection (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

### AWS SSM Document

Document Name: AWS-ExecuteAwsApi
API Call: eks:DescribeNodegroup

### Workflow Logic

1. Start SSM automation with AWS-ExecuteAwsApi
2. Wait until automation execution completes
3. Fail if the final status is not Success
